articles.title: Michael Saylor shares the ‘best way’ to grow your investment '100x'
articles.description: Bitcoin maximalist Michael Saylor recently shared a strategy for regular traders to earn 100x returns.

articles.title: XRP overtakes USDT as third-largest crypto after 10% price surge in 24 hours
articles.description: XRP has surged 10% over the past 24 hours to reach $2. 6, lifting its market capitalization to approximately $152 billion and reclaiming its position as the third-largest crypto asset, CoinGecko data shows. The surge narrowly pushed Ripple's flagship currency ahead of Tethers USDT, which also achieved a major milestone. USDT's market cap hit $150 billion for the first time on Monday, cementing its role as the leading and most widely used stablecoin in the crypto ecosystem

articles.title: Ethereum +40% in a Week: Staking Profitable Again
articles.description: Ethereum rises 40 per cent in a week: staking returns to profit, pushing positive sentiment in the crypto market.

articles.title: Ethereum Price Completes Bullish Structure Break – $3,000 Comes Next
articles.description: According to a fresh analysis by a crypto analyst, the Ethereum price has broken out of a months-long downtrend, reigniting bullish sentiment across the market. With volume rising and key resistance levels expected to turn into support, Ethereum is set to complete its bullish structure, aiming for a potential break toward $3,000. articles.title: Ethereum surpasses Coca-Cola and Alibaba in market cap after Pectra upgrade surge
articles.description: 12-5-2025 – Ethereum’s native token has eclipsed the market capitalisation of global powerhouses Coca-Cola and Alibaba, following the successful implementation of its highly anticipated Pectra upgrade. Data from 8marketcap reveals Ether has secured its position as the world’s 39th-largest asset, with its value reaching $2,550 and commanding a market capitalisation exceeding $308 billion. articles.title: Cardano ecosystem: Is the blockchain up to the competition?
articles.description: Cardano (ADA) grows with AI focus, DeFi records, and a new development phase – Hoskinson sets clear technological impulses for 2025. The article Cardano ecosystem: Is the blockchain up to the competition? was first published on Crypto Valley Journal.

articles.title: Ethereum Staking Giant Lido Loses Just 1.4 ETH in Hacking Attempt
articles.description: Lido, Ethereum’s largest liquid staking protocol, avoided a major security incident after one of its nine oracle keys was compromised in what appears to be a low-impact but serious breach involving validator operator Chorus One.Lido secures over 25% of all ETH staked on Ethereum, making it one of the most systemically important protocols in the Ethereum ecosystem.The compromised key was tied to a hot wallet used for oracle reporting, leading to the theft of just 1.46 ETH ($4,200) in gas fees
